raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The Orange County Board of Supervisors approved the Orange County Housing Finance Trust on March 13, 2019.",
    "Supportive Housing combines local and state resources with private sector efforts.",
    "Assembly Bill 448 authorizes the County and cities in Orange County to create the Orange County Housing Finance Trust.",
    "The Orange County Housing Finance Trust will not regulate land use or serve as owner or operator of housing units.",
    "The Orange County Housing Finance Trust will not impose fees or approve a housing project or program without local governing body support.",
    "The OC Community Resource's Housing Funding Strategy has an initial goal of 2,700 new supportive and affordable housing units within six years.",
    "Funding sources have reduced the capital gap to $252 million for housing initiatives.",
    "The Board designated $70.5 million in Mental Health Services Act money to address housing priorities.",
    "Over 1,000 units of supportive and affordable housing have been supported as a result of the Board’s efforts."
  ]
}
```
